---
page-layout: full
---

::: {.teaching-title}

# Teaching

:::

::: {.teaching-intro}

My teaching experience spans undergraduate and graduate courses in economics, econometrics, and quantitative methods. I have served as both an instructor and teaching assistant at UCLA, CIDE, and Universidad Iberoamericana.

:::


## Instructor

### Microeconomic Theory I (Econ 11)
*University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)*  
Summer 2022



## Teaching Assistant

### Microeconomic Theory I (Econ 11)
*University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)*  
Fall 2020–2024

### Microeconomics for Public Affairs (PA 40)
*University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)*  
Winter & Spring 2022–2023

### Microeconomic Theory II (Graduate)
*Centro de Investigación y Docencia Económicas (CIDE), Mexico*  
Spring 2018

### Applied Econometrics (Graduate)
*Centro de Investigación y Docencia Económicas (CIDE), Mexico*  
Fall 2017

### Biostatistics (Graduate)
*Universidad Iberoamericana, Mexico*  
2016–2017

### Intermediate Microeconomics
*Centro de Investigación y Docencia Económicas (CIDE), Mexico*  
2013
